title: Throw Error
description: Define custom error types and write functions that can throw those errors when problems occur.
problemStatement:
Custom failure! Create an enum `InputError` that conforms to the `Error` protocol. Write a function `check(value:)` that throws an error if the value is negative.

**Requirement:** Use the `throws` keyword in the function signature.
hints: Enums are perfect for defining a set of related error conditions.
